top3.sql:
SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6' AND a1.molecule_id = 'TR001';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6' AND a1.molecule_id = 'TR001';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON c.bond_id = m.molecule_id || '_2_6'
WHERE m.label = 'TR001';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6';

JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6' AND a1.molecule_id = 'TR001';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON c.bond_id = m.molecule_id || '_2_6'
WHERE m.label = 'TR001';

SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6';

final.sql:
SELECT a1.element, a2.element
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR001_2_6' AND a1.molecule_id = 'TR001';
